MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Hearing on claim of exemption. The hearing is continued to May 28, 2008 at 9:00 a.m., at the request of the moving party. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-16-2008 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-04-2007 Continued To Jan-28-08 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Dec-11-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Sajja Ravinantapricha & Carla Amador, CSR: Lavena Ward #7077 (Department 218)

Appearances
Plaintiff, John J. Lucena and Janice Lucena, are present.
Attorney, Lino V. Martire, is present representing the plaintiffs.

Defendant, Patrick Roddie, individual, Patrick Roddie dba Patrick Roddie Photography, is not present.
(Default was entered on 11/29/07 as to the defendant)

This cause came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing. John J. Lucena and Janice Lucena are sworn and examined by Lino V. Martire.

After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defaulted Defendant, Patrick Roddie, individual, Patrick Roddie dba Patrick Roddie Photography, as follows:

Defendant shall pay plaintiff, as and for special damages, the sum of $5,000.00, general damages in the sum of $500,000.00, and cost in the sum of $512.00 for a total Judgment of $505,512.00. Judgment by Court signed in open court.
